title: Ability to limit widget control or lock placement

posts.author: fusoya (Eric Cloninger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

We keep finding our widgets in the item detail page in disarray. Someone is accidentally moving/resizing widgets, or just playing with them and not realizing it effects everyone’s view. Please allow some level of control over who has ability to adjust this “board-wide” UI. I would think by default, Members shouldn’t be able to make adjustments to the UI that effects other users.

What are you trying to achieve

A section in the permissions list for this level of control would be super helpful.
